creator: pfg@apache.org
text:
On 01.11.2013 17:21, Tijl Coosemans wrote:
> On Fri, 01 Nov 2013 15:21:37 -0500 Pedro Giffuni wrote:
>> One more change:
>>
>> HADOOP_HOME is deprecated use HADOOP_PREFIX instead to clear a warning.
> Should the file also be called 001.hadoop_prefix.env then?
It could be done for consistency but I don't think it actually
makes any difference.

Apparently HADOOP_PREFIX shouldn't be exported to the user but just 
renaming the old HADOOP_HOME as I did takes care of the warning and is 
what other people have done.

I will keep investigating for a future update but for now it's nice not 
to have the warning.

Pedro.
